pageTitle: cyHave the other parties agreed to this application?
caption: cyMake an application
heading: cyHave the other parties agreed to this application?
question: cyHave the other parties agreed to this application?
hint: cyIf you ask the court for more than one thing, this answer will apply to all of them.
theOtherPartyIsTheOtherSide: cyThe ‘other party’ is the other side involved in your case. For example your landlord, housing association, or mortgage lender.
everyOtherPartyWillNeedToAgree: cyEvery other party will need to agree to let you make this application, if they don’t agree you may need to pay a higher fee.
ifTheOtherPartiesDoNotAgree: cyIf the other parties do not agree
feeWillIncreaseIf: cyYour application fee will increase to {{maxFee, currency(currency: GBP; trailingZeroDisplay: stripIfInteger)}}, if:
youHaveAlreadyToldTheOtherParty: cyyou have already told the other party that you are making this application, and
theyDidNotAgreeToIt: cythey did not agree to it (this means that they have objected to it)
youWillSeeTheFinalApplicationFee: cyYou’ll see the final application fee before you pay.
youWillNeedToUploadEvidence: cyYou will need to upload evidence for the court, to show that:
youHaveToldTheOtherParties: cyyou have told the other parties, and
forExampleACopyOfALetter: cyFor example a copy of a letter, email, or a signed consent order. We will ask you to upload this evidence later in this application.
ifYouAreNotAbleToContactOtherParties: cyIf you’re not able to contact the other parties, or you’ve attempted to contact them but have not responded, select ‘No’.

errors.confirmWhetherOtherPartiesHaveAgreed: cyConfirm whether the other parties have agreed to this application
